caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard, wearing a brown jacket over a dark shirt, stands outdoors in front of greenery and trees while speaking into a microphone. An "ANI" logo is visible on the microphone. Various graphics overlay the scene, including a red banner at the top and a yellow banner at the bottom. The bottom banner consistently reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है" and displays the time "10:07 PM." The top red banner changes text across the sequence, first displaying "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", then "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?", and finally "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी h". Small inset photos of various political figures appear on the sides of the frame, accompanied by names such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," and "विजय चौधरी." A "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the final frame.
